name: linSchedulerModeChange Selectors
title: linSchedulerModeChange Selectors
return: Time stamp synchronized with the global time base on the
tables: Time stamp synchronized with the global time base on the computer (CAN hardware or PC system clock). Unit: 10µs
Time stamp synchronized with the global time base on the computer (CAN hardware or PC system clock). Unit: nanoseconds

Time stamp generated by the LIN hardware. This time stamp is unsynchronized with the global time base on the computer and thus still original. It can be used to compare the time of two LIN hardware generated events. Unit: 10µs

Status of MsgOrigTime: Bit 0 set Time stamp is valid Bit 0 not set Time stamp is invalid Bit 1 set Time stamp was generated by software Bit 1 not set Time stamp was generated by hardware Bit 4 Has a bus-specific meaning; not currently in use for LIN
Time stamp was generated by software
Time stamp was generated by hardware
